subject: Mac fan loud and sluggish during video calls
description: During Zoom/Meet laptop gets hot, fans ramp, UI stutters; happens on desk without bed blocking vents.

ts_steps.title: Activity Monitor CPU
ts_steps.action: Sort by % CPU; quit runaway apps and heavy browser tabs.

ts_steps.title: GPU History
ts_steps.action: Activity Monitor → Window → GPU History — correlate spikes with call.

ts_steps.title: Energy tab
ts_steps.action: Identify preventing sleep and high energy apps.

ts_steps.title: Thermal surface
ts_steps.action: Hard flat surface; never block hinge exhaust.

ts_steps.title: AC power
ts_steps.action: Use Apple adapter for sustained performance on supported models.

ts_steps.title: Low Power Mode
ts_steps.action: Settings → Battery — disable temporarily to test call quality.

ts_steps.title: Display load
ts_steps.action: Lower external resolution; test without ProMotion external if applicable.

ts_steps.title: GPU acceleration toggle
ts_steps.action: In meeting app advanced video settings test hardware accel on/off.

ts_steps.title: Post-update indexing
ts_steps.action: Allow 24–48 h after macOS upgrade for Photos/Spotlight to finish.

ts_steps.title: Software Update
ts_steps.action: Install pending macOS updates for thermal fixes.

ts_steps.title: Apple Diagnostics
ts_steps.action: If idle temps high with no apps: run diagnostics at boot; escalate hardware.

internal_information: Apple Silicon thermals tied to GPU/video encode and indexing. No user SMC reset or Intel thermal paste narrative.
